profile_backed_target.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/ --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2
profile_backed_target.selection_reason: Recent pass82-pass84 GEMM traversal variants failed the keep gate, so this pass pivoted to the next non-GEMM linalg hotspot.

alien_graveyard.source: /data/projects/alien_cs_graveyard/alien_cs_graveyard.md section 9.6 CA-QR/TSQR and cache-local dense submatrix kernels
alien_graveyard.applied_slice: Moved fixed-size QR-iteration scratch allocation out of the eig hot loop without changing the current V1 QR iteration algorithm.

candidate.one_lever: Reusable scratch buffers for qr_decomposition, R*Q, and q_total*Q inside eig_qr_iteration.
candidate.source_state_after_rejection: restored; git diff is empty for crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs
candidate.reason: The midpoint win was only 1.5-2.0% and the confirmation interval overlapped the baseline. Score 1.6 is below the >=2.0 keep threshold for this amount of code.

candidate_rebench_1.command: RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

candidate_rebench_2.command: RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

score.rationale: The measured signal is real enough to record but not strong enough to keep; next work should replace the eig primitive family rather than move another allocation.

behavior_proof.candidate_test_command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax linalg::tests --lib -- --nocapture
behavior_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved QR iteration order, Gram-Schmidt column order, R*Q order, q_total*Q order, off-diagonal scan order, diagonal extraction order, and row-major eigenvector output order. Retained code has no source diff.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking: Eig path has no comparator/tie-breaking changes; retained code has no source diff.
behavior_proof.floating_point: Candidate kept the same f64 multiply/add/sub/sqrt expressions in the same loop order. Retained code has no source diff.
behavior_proof.rng: No RNG state or random primitive is involved.
behavior_proof.errors: Arity, square-matrix, dtype extraction, and Complex128 wrapping behavior are unchanged; retained code has no source diff.

validation.notes: Reported formatting diffs in crates/fj-lax/benches/lax_baseline.rs, crates/fj-lax/src/arithmetic.rs, and crates/fj-lax/src/lib.rs; those files were not edited by this pass.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax linalg::tests --lib -- --nocapture

next_primitive.primitive: shifted/deflated QR with packed Hessenberg real layout, or a behavior-contract bead for FP-reordering eig algorithms
next_primitive.reason: Scratch lifetime movement is the wrong depth after this rejection; the remaining eig cost is algorithmic QR iteration work.
